{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work (Reddi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing methods.",
    "R1.7": "Flags a potential missing citation issue with the preprint/journal handling of Duchi–Hazan–Singer.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty in specific areas.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but includes some extraneous material about the high-dimensional regime.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; no harmful patterns mentioned.",
    "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for any changes made to the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work (Reddi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing methods.
rationale.R1.7: Flags a potential missing citation issue with the preprint/journal handling of Duchi–Hazan–Singer.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty in specific areas.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but includes some extraneous material about the high-dimensional regime.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; no harmful patterns mentioned.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for any changes made to the original text.
